# Optional / non-blocking checks for the quality-gate aggregator (#300).
#
# One check-run NAME per line. A check listed here NEVER blocks the gate, even if
# it fails or is absent. Use this only for genuinely advisory / experimental
# checks. Anything not listed here and not in required-checks.txt still has to
# pass IF it runs on the commit ("present must pass") — that default keeps new
# checks (e.g. CodeQL "Analyze (...)") blocking by default rather than silently
# ignored.
#
# (Empty by default.)
